name: Notion
description: Monitor Notion workspace members, integration access, and activity for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to notion.so/profile/integrations
2. Click 'New integration' (or select an existing one)
3. Give it a name and select the workspace you want to connect
4. Under Capabilities, make sure 'Read user information including email addresses' is enabled
5. Copy the Internal Integration Secret and paste it below

credentialFields.label: Internal Integration Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your Notion internal integration secret. Go to notion.so/profile/integrations, create or select an integration, and copy the Internal Integration Secret.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Notion workspace members and verifies active user access

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that Notion has dedicated bot integrations for automated processes, separating human from automated access

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews Notion workspace membership and identifies users without email verification
